title: GreaterHorns
description: Adds more functionality to goat horns! You can wake up an ancient city, or use them in dispensers.
body:
This mod adds extra functionality to goat horns. It is fun to mess around with. You can:

-Remove their cooldown

-Make them interact with sculk sensors

-Make them interact with dispensers

You can change the settings by using the custom commands, and all of the settings can work together.

Video Preview: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oWmXjCTjyck](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oWmXjCTjyck)
